frameworks.title: Global competency framework for regulators of medicines
frameworks.description: A comprehensive framework developed by WHO to strengthen regulatory workforce competencies for medicines regulation worldwide.

frameworks.title: WHO quality management competency framework
frameworks.description: Defines core and advanced competencies for quality management systems in medicine regulatory environments.

frameworks.title: WHO pharmacovigilance competency framework
frameworks.description: Supports capability building for safety signal detection, risk communication, and post-market surveillance.

frameworks.title: WHO inspection and compliance framework
frameworks.description: Competency map for GMP inspections, enforcement readiness, and corrective action oversight.

frameworks.title: WHO digital regulation competency framework
frameworks.description: Builds regulator skills for digital submissions, data integrity, and electronic document workflows.

frameworks.title: WHO clinical evaluation competency framework
frameworks.description: Framework for evidence review, benefit-risk evaluation, and clinical dossier assessment competency.

frameworks.title: National competency framework baseline
frameworks.description: Baseline competency framework for national regulator teams across inspection, licensing, and surveillance.

frameworks.title: NRA inspection supervisor framework
frameworks.description: National competency baseline for inspection supervisors and field decision-making.

frameworks.title: NRA product quality review framework
frameworks.description: Supports national-level competency development for product quality and consistency checks.

frameworks.title: NRA post-market surveillance framework
frameworks.description: Competencies for adverse event tracking, incident follow-up, and market surveillance operations.

frameworks.title: NRA regulatory intelligence framework
frameworks.description: Framework for policy scanning, intelligence collection, and regulatory response planning.
